units.source_text: 1 組合分散效應指所持組合包含不同風險類別產⽣的分散市場風險效應。此數額反映將多種不同類別風險（例如利率及信貸息差）納入⼀個組合時對非系統性市場風
units.translation_target_text: 1 Portfolio diversification effect refers to the diversification market risk effect produced by holding a portfolio containing different risk categories. This amount reflects the impact on non-systemic market risks when combining different types of risks (such as interest rates and credit spreads) into a portfolio.
units.translation_en: 1 Portfolio diversification effect refers to the diversification market risk effect produced by holding a portfolio containing different risk categories. This amount reflects the impact on non-systemic market risks when combining different types of risks (such as interest rates and credit spreads) into a portfolio.

term_decisions.numeric_token_policy: preserve source numeric tokens when validator requires literal evidence

layout_variants.display_en: 1 Portfolio diversification effect refers to the diversification market risk effect produced by holding a portfolio containing different risk categories. This amount reflects the impact on non-systemic market risks when combining different types of risks (such as interest rates and credit spreads) into a portfolio.

units.source_text: 險的減幅，相關計算⽅法為將個別風險類別的估計虧損風險總和減去合計估計虧損風險總額所得的差額。負數代表組合分散帶來的效益。由於不同風險類別的最⾼
units.translation_target_text: The relevant calculation method is the difference obtained by subtracting the total estimated loss risk from the total estimated loss risk of individual risk categories. Negative numbers represent the benefits of portfolio diversification. Since different risk categories have the highest
units.translation_en: The relevant calculation method is the difference obtained by subtracting the total estimated loss risk from the total estimated loss risk of individual risk categories. Negative numbers represent the benefits of portfolio diversification. Since different risk categories have the highest

Negative numbers represent the benefits of portfolio diversification. Since different risk categories have the highest

units.source_text: 及最低數額在不同⽇期出現，因此就該等計量指標計算組合分散效益並無意義。
units.translation_target_text: and minimum amounts occur on different dates, so it is meaningless to calculate portfolio diversification benefits for these measures.

units.translation_target_text: 2 Due to the risk diversification effect, the total estimated loss risk is not the sum of the estimated loss risks of each risk category.
